body:
Represent z, u, ts using just one struct for both surface and interior values. 
Replaces kwdef structs, defines new constructors.
Adds compat entry for Documenter.jl
title: Simplify structs

body:
StaticArrays support left-over from ClimateMachine.
This is unnecessary within the SurfaceFluxes package. Removes dependence on StaticArrays and updates tests to use tuples.
title: Remove dependence on StaticArrays
